metadata.description: Super Domain epistemic layer — complements Louvain community structure
metadata.reference: Eric Little, 'Reasoning with Knowledge Graphs — Super Domains', KG Conference NYC 2025

base_domain.description: Brute facts — asserted with high confidence, no hedging

super_domain.description: Epistemic facts — hypothesized, speculative, prophetic, negative, or contested

hypotheses.label: cancer stem cells — disease recurrence — tumor heterogeneity
hypotheses.evidence_summary: expression of cancer stem cell markers, potentially mediating immune escape and recurrence
